subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the divine fragrances wafting from the direction of the Covenant, regarding the tradition narrated concerning the Eye of the Cow [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من انجذب بنفحات القدس الهاب من مهب المیثاق در خصوص حدیث مروی در حق عین بقر
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture
